human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for accommodation-specific guest-communications boundary discipline, reservation and folio mismatch handling, accessibility-aware communication, public-health and fraud escalation, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and retail-consumer-and-hospitality research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for service-support-and-resolution plus retail-consumer-and-hospitality are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to accommodation and travel guest communications, including reservation, stay, disruption, and service-recovery messaging without rate, refund, compensation, fraud, or safety authority drift.

Authority sources cover ADA lodging communication and reservation handling, short-term-lodging fee disclosure, billing-error boundaries, outbreak communication, identity-theft controls, and call-center payment-security handling with refresh and decay rules.
Scenario set covers missing evidence, booking and folio mismatches, policy exceptions, repeat failures, fraud and safety conditions, conflicting policy, high-volume intake, and tenant fact gaps.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdictional, property, brand, supplier, and processor differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
